title: Simplified Four-Variable Karnaugh Map Structure
description: A visual grid showing the layout and grouping principles of a four-variable Karnaugh Map (K-map) used for simplifying Boolean algebra expressions.
relationships: Grid cells represent all 16 minterms of variables A, B, C, D
Adjacent cells differ by only one variable (Gray code ordering)
Groups of 1, 2, 4, 8, or 16 adjacent '1's form prime implicants
Each group corresponds to a simplified product term in the Boolean expression
